scenes.headline: Prism vs Agent Harnesses
scenes.body: AI agent tools are moving fast. They are not all solving the same problem.

scenes.headline: Harnesses run the agent turn.
scenes.body: Prompt. Tools. Task runner. Action goes in and out.

scenes.headline: Real teams need more than execution.
scenes.body: Users, memory, workflows, approvals, deployment, source adapters, and artifacts start surrounding the box.

scenes.headline: Prism is a deployable workspace platform.
scenes.body: The agent runtime sits inside a broader operating surface for team work.

scenes.headline: A message becomes structured work.
scenes.body: A request can carry context, references, status, owner, workflow state, and execution history.

scenes.headline: The agent does not start from zero.
scenes.body: Prism separates rolling community memory from durable knowledge so context arrives when it matters.

scenes.headline: Harnesses run agents. Prism runs work through agents.
scenes.body: The question widens from execution to the whole operating loop around execution.

scenes.headline: Useful AI work needs infrastructure around the agent.
Deployable agent workspace infrastructure
scenes.body: Agent harnesses help agents run. Prism helps teams run work through agents.
